reviews.comment:
La atención en la parrilla fue PESIMA .20 minutos esperando q viniera el mozo. Hasta  nos cambiamos de mesa para ver si nos atendían. Todo el mundo se quejaba de lo mismo, parecía a propósito.
La carne era sabrosa y tierna, pero llegó fría.  Y los precios un robo! Media porción de vacío sin guarnición y pura grasa 130 pesos. 150 pesos un sándwich! (Octubre 2017)
Está ubicada en un lugar estratégico de la ruta 2( es parada casi obligada para el turismo), y se abusan de eso en los precios. Y encima con una atención pésima.
Resumen: son esos lugares típicos que se abusan del turista, y por los cuales lamentablemente los argentinos eligen pasar sus vacaciones en otros países.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the grill was TERRIBLE. We waited 20 minutes for the waiter. We even changed tables to see if they'd serve us. Everyone was complaining about the same thing; it seemed like they were doing it on purpose.
The meat was tasty and tender, but it arrived cold. And the prices were a rip-off! A half portion of flank steak with no side and pure fat cost 130 pesos. A sandwich was 150 pesos! (October 2017)
It's located in a strategic spot on Route 2 (it's practically a mandatory stop for tourists), and they take advantage of that with the prices. And on top of that, the service is awful.

In short: it's one of those typical places that rip off tourists, and unfortunately, that's why Argentinians choose to spend their vacations in other countries.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMWNieWJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Se puede descansar bajo los árboles en un muy amplio sector para estacionar y con mesas y bancos para pic nic. Baños muy limpios. Confortables mesas y sillones  dentro del full service. Con variedad de comidas acorde a la hora... desde panninis hasta yogures. La cafeteria tiene menos personal qie el que necesitaría para quien sólo busca una parada rápida ennla ruta. Tiene sector de juegos para niños al aire libre y pelotero cubierto
Para los autos todo para sacarte del paso por algún inconveniente de gomería y mecánica ligera

(Translated by Google)
You can rest under the trees in a very large parking area with picnic tables and benches. The restrooms are very clean. There are comfortable tables and chairs inside the full-service restaurant. They offer a variety of food options depending on the time of day, from paninis to yogurt. The cafeteria is understaffed, which is ideal for someone just looking for a quick stop along the route. There's an outdoor children's play area and an indoor ball pit. For cars, they have everything you need to get you out of a jam with a tire problem or minor mechanical issues.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBa2Z1cHB3RRAB
